attachments.fallback: Amplify - Podcast App Built Using Fuse - @lakexyde (Olalekan)
attachments.text:
Hi guys,

Glad to announce that I’ve finally released a Podcast app built using Fuse on the Google Play Store. It was previously built on Flutter but I had to take up the challenge to rebuild. It was a tough decisions because I had to learn a lot. iOS is almost done, just a few bugs here and there. I plan to build more app using Fuse.

You can check it out below. (Will drop the App Store link when…
